project.name: ticketsplit (fork)
project.maintainer_note: Forked from outdated Python 2 codebase. Modernised for personal use. Optimised and improved for release

description: Modernised version of ticketsplit with updated Python terminology and identifiers. This is an early release and not fully functional.

v2.1.0: Huge QOL improvements and improved code
v2.2.0: Added web functionality and dependencies, another way to price search (scraping and free API)

notes: This version is an early build and is still under active development. More features and fixes are planned.
